score_comparison.note: Score and decision band are identical. Both reports show 60/CONDITIONAL/INVESTIGATE. Score is anchored to grounding evidence which is identical (CEU_MATCH). Score is NOT driven by signal values.

signal_display_comparison.baseline_display: Fan-In Concentration (PSIG-001): HIGH — Statistically abnormal concentration — Value 5.663
signal_display_comparison.orchestrated_display: Fan-In Concentration (PSIG-001): HIGH — Statistically abnormal concentration — Value 4.55
signal_display_comparison.display_delta: Value 5.663 → 4.55, Domain DOM-04 → DOM-05. Statistically abnormal detection persists (both HIGH), but numeric magnitude and primary domain differ.

signal_display_comparison.baseline_display: Fan-Out Propagation (PSIG-002): HIGH — Statistically abnormal concentration — Value 3.2098
signal_display_comparison.orchestrated_display: Fan-Out Propagation (PSIG-002): HIGH — Statistically abnormal concentration — Value 4.55
signal_display_comparison.orchestrated_domain: DOM-04, DOM-05, DOM-08, DOM-09 (multi-domain, no primary)
signal_display_comparison.display_delta: Value 3.2098 → 4.55. Baseline: domain_coupling_pressure on DOM-04 (per_dom_aggregated_imports). Orchestrated: export_pressure on DOM-05 (per_node_outbound_exports). Different underlying metric visible in statement text.

signal_display_comparison.baseline_display: Responsibility Concentration (PSIG-004): HIGH — Statistically abnormal concentration — Value 2.1822
signal_display_comparison.orchestrated_display: Responsibility Concentration (PSIG-004): HIGH — Statistically abnormal concentration — Value 1.0
signal_display_comparison.display_delta: Value 2.1822 → 1.0. Primary domain shifts from DOM-04 (backend_app_root) to DOM-05 (backend_common). Both report COMPOUND_ZONE convergence.

signal_display_comparison.baseline_display: Structural Blind Spot (PSIG-006): BASELINE — theoretical baseline condition (not activated) — Value 0
signal_display_comparison.orchestrated_display: Structural Blind Spot (PSIG-006): BASELINE — theoretical baseline condition (not activated) — Value 0.15151515151515152
signal_display_comparison.display_delta: Value 0 → 0.1515. Both correctly display BASELINE (not activated). The report generator correctly treats THEORETICAL_BASELINE signals as BASELINE display regardless of vault active_pressure_signals miscounting. The schema bridge bug in vault does NOT propagate to this display label — however the vault artifact is still incorrect (active_pressure_signals=4 vs correct=3).

pressure_zone_display_comparison.orchestrated_zone_conditions_all: PSIG-001 · PSIG-002 · PSIG-004 (all 4 zones share same condition set)
pressure_zone_display_comparison.display_delta: 1 zone → 4 zones. Primary domain shifts DOM-04 → DOM-05. Zone count increase reflects PIOS compute_pressure_zones.py finding 4 domains with activation counts >= threshold from binding_envelope topology.

domain_count_display_comparison.note: Baseline report uses semantic domain counts from a different report template variant. Orchestrated report uses canonical_topology counts (13 DOM groups). These reflect different output schemas in lens_report_generator.py — not a data delta.

graph_state_comparison.note: Both reports render the same 18-node, 17-link graph. Graph topology in the report is derived from CEU/DOM grounding structure which is identical.

surface_delta_explanation: All visible value differences in the report (PSIG values, primary domain, zone count, zone anchor) trace directly to the STRUCTURAL_TOPOLOGY_DELTA and SIGNAL_VALUE_DELTA documented in BLOCK_C and BLOCK_F. The schema bridge bug (BLOCK_G) is present in the vault artifact but does NOT produce visible distortion in the PSIG-006 display label — lens_report_generator.py correctly handles THEORETICAL_BASELINE rendering. The score (60/CONDITIONAL/INVESTIGATE) is unchanged because it is anchored to grounding evidence, not signal values.
